cases.prompt: Expo 앱으로 모바일 네이티브 UI 만들어줘

assertions.text: Applies React Native + Expo standards: navigation (expo-router), state, and native modules.
Uses performance practices (FlashList, Reanimated) and the Hermes runtime.
Supports iOS and Android simultaneously with an EAS Build/Submit pipeline.

cases.prompt: Set up react native expo standards for a new mobile app

assertions.text: Establishes expo-router navigation and a state-management approach.
Configures the EAS Build/Submit pipeline for native mobile UI.
Recognizes web React is out of scope and belongs to /vercel-react (this skill assumes RN/Expo is chosen).
